query: muddy low contrast gray oppressive heavy fog smog suffocating bleak atmosphere
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: low-contrast oppressive — fog, smog, monotone gray, weak tonal separation, suffocating bleakness

response.objective_caption: A tall industrial smokestack rises behind a low rectangular factory building situated along a shoreline. Several birds fly through the air in the foreground. A row of palm trees stands between the building and a beach where waves meet the shore. Distant hills and additional vegetation are visible through atmospheric mist.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A tall industrial smokestack rises behind a low rectangular factory building situated along a shoreline, emitting smoke or steam that blends into the heavy mist. Several birds fly in the foreground above a row of palm trees and a beach with gentle waves. The scene is rendered in desaturated, washed-out blue-gray tones with flat, directionless lighting that eliminates most shadows and depth. Extremely low contrast crushes midtones into a narrow tonal range, creating a heavy, suffocating atmosphere that evokes unease and melancholy.
